# terrible_community_general_pids (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `ignore_case` (Boolean) Ignore case in pattern if using the `pattern` option.
- `name` (String) The name of the process(es) you want to get PID(s) for.
- `pattern` (String) The pattern (regular expression) to match the process(es) you want to get PID(s) for.

### Read-Only

- `pids` (String) Process IDs of the given process.
